headline: 🚀 Musk posts official Cybercab production video — 'Cybercab has started production'; footage shows interior with NO steering wheel or pedals; multiple units confirmed built; TSLA +<1% premarket after post-earnings selloff
source: Elon Musk / X · Bloomberg · Benzinga · Sherwood News

headline: Tesla Spring Update 2026.14.1/2026.14.2 goes wide release — Hey Grok voice assistant, standalone FSD app, Cyberhog Pet Mode, sharper Model 3/Y visualizations now rolling fleet-wide
🚨 Tesla quietly buries $2B AI hardware acquisition in 10-Q — unnamed company; $1.8B contingent on deployment milestones; could accelerate Optimus or FSD chip roadmap
⚠️ TSLA closes $373.60, -3.59% post-earnings — CFO confirms negative FCF for rest of 2026; $25B capex ($5B above prior guidance); Fortune: 'earned next to nothing on cars in Q1'; -17% YTD

Musk on Q1 call: Optimus production starts 'late July or August' at Fremont — second Giga Texas factory targets summer 2027; Gen 3 reveal pushed closer to production; ramp rates 'impossible to predict'
⚠️ Musk confirms HW3 CANNOT achieve Unsupervised FSD — 'simply does not have the capability'; only 1/8 memory bandwidth of HW4/AI4; v14 Lite (supervised only) coming to HW3 by end of June
Tesla Q1 2026 BEAT: Revenue $22.38B (+16% YoY), non-GAAP EPS $0.41 (+52% YoY), gross margin 21.1% (+478 bps YoY), FCF $1.4B (+117% YoY) — strongest margins in years
⚠️ Tesla quietly slips 5-city robotaxi 1H 2026 timelines — Phoenix, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, Las Vegas now 'preparations underway' with no firm date; only Dallas + Houston confirmed live
source: Electrek / Business Insider / Tesla Q1 Deck
